channel.title: the neobankbeat blog
channel.description: Deep dives on the neobank landscape — the three waves, stablecoin cards, self-custody, safety, MiCA, niche banking and emerging markets — grounded in open data on 362 tracked neobanks.

item.title: Who funds the neobanks? The 198 investors behind digital banking
item.description: 198 venture and strategic investors mapped to the 122 neobanks they backed — Ribbit's pure thesis, Tencent's quiet global portfolio, YC's seed factory, and why the web3 wave isn't VC-funded at all.

item.title: The State of Neobanks 2026: what 357 verified-active digital banks reveal
item.description: The founding boom is over, the stablecoin race is on, and a third of new neobanks are self-custodial. Ten findings from the full open dataset of 357 verified-active neobanks.

item.title: Best neobanks for freelancers and small businesses (2026 field guide)
item.description: 43 tracked neobanks are built for freelancers, creators or SMBs — from Mercury and Qonto to Hnry, which files your taxes for you. How to choose, what actually differs, and the global picks by region.

item.title: MiCA and the crypto neobank: who's actually licensed in Europe
item.description: What CASP authorisation means, which tracked neobanks hold it, how e-money tokens changed euro stablecoins, and where the gaps are.

item.title: Where neobanks actually win: Africa, Latin America and the underbanked billion
item.description: Nubank has 131M customers — more than every US neobank combined. The data on why emerging markets are the real neobank story.

item.title: Niche neobanks: 117 banks for women, teens, immigrants, freelancers and the faithful
item.description: A third of all neobanks now serve a specific audience. The full map of 117 niche neobanks and why the strategy works.

item.title: No-KYC money apps in 2026: what's actually possible (and what isn't)
item.description: Only 12 of 357 tracked neobanks work without identity checks — all of them self-custodial wallets. What no-KYC really means and where the line sits.

item.title: The rise of the self-custodial neobank: 47 apps where you hold the keys
item.description: A new category of neobank holds none of your money. What MetaMask, Gnosis Pay, Payy and 44 others are building, and where the model still leaks.

item.title: Stablecoin cards explained: how a Visa that spends USDC actually works
item.description: The full mechanics of stablecoin cards — authorization, conversion, settlement — plus custody models and what GENIUS and MiCA changed.

item.title: Are neobanks safe? Deposit insurance, partner banks and the Synapse lesson
item.description: Whether your money is protected depends on the regulatory model behind the app. How each one works, and what the Synapse collapse taught us.

item.title: Neobank vs traditional bank: what actually changes (and what doesn't)
item.description: Fees, speed, deposit insurance, credit, branches — an honest side-by-side, including the licence question most comparisons skip.

item.title: What is a neobank? The three waves explained (2026 guide)
item.description: Traditional challengers, hybrid crypto apps and self-custodial web3 wallets — how the three neobank waves differ, with data on all 357 tracked entities.
